notes: Escort: outfit your convoy. Spend 🔫 weapons, 🛸 combat drones and 🧠 AI cores in the new Outfit panel to bolt attack and defense onto any ship — your flagship or the freighters you're guarding. Weapons & drones add flat firepower/mitigation; AI cores multiply with diminishing returns. Finally a way to harden the freighters attackers love to pick off. Assets are consumed for the run (a credit/material sink); re-rig dockside or between legs for free, or mid-ambush at the cost of that round.
